tasks.name: Runtime setup probe for honest-compute experiments
tasks.description: Probe max batch size, flash attention availability, torch.compile stability, and 2-GPU split feasibility before any new diagnostic run.

pilot.pass_criteria: Detect a non-OOM batch >=16 on at least one runtime path and emit explicit backend/compile metadata.

visualizations.description: Runtime probe matrix for batch size, backend, compile, and latency

tasks.name: Pilot benefit-bucket audit on GSM8K headline pair
tasks.description: Build per-sample fixed/harmed/no-effect audit for the main GSM8K comparison using the optimized runtime path from shared_runtime_probe.

pilot.pass_criteria: Emit per-sample buckets with >=95% sample coverage and a summary that explains aggregate gain using fixed/harmed/no-effect counts.

visualizations.description: Fixed/harmed/no-effect bucket proportions for the headline pair
